Title: Add company info section to profile page
Description: Users should be able to add and manage company details from their profile page. This includes company name, address, and phone number. Data is persisted to the database and can be edited at any time.
AcceptanceCriteria: Profile page displays a Company Information section
User can enter and edit company name, address, and phone number
Company data is saved to the backend and persisted in the database
Form validation enforces required fields and validates phone number format
User receives clear success or error feedback when saving company information
TalkingPoints: Add a company information section to the profile page so users can store their business details. This involves frontend form work, backend schema updates, and database migrations. Next: design the schema and create API endpoint.

Tasks.Title: Update database schema to add company fields
Tasks.Description: Add company_name, company_address, and company_phone columns to the users table in Supabase.

Tasks.Title: Create backend API endpoint for company info
Tasks.Description: Add PATCH /auth/profile endpoint to update company details. Include validation for phone number format and required fields.

Tasks.Title: Update Pydantic models for company fields
Tasks.Description: Modify UserUpdate and UserResponse models to include company_name, company_address, and company_phone.

Tasks.Title: Build company info form on profile page
Tasks.Description: Add Company Information section to profile page with input fields for name, address, and phone. Include form validation and error messages.

Tasks.Title: Update AuthContext to include company data
Tasks.Description: Extend AuthContext to store and sync company information from profile updates.

Tasks.Title: Test company info save and validation
Tasks.Description: Verify form validation, API calls, database persistence, and error handling.
